        query = """SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS courses_completed,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS assignments_completed,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) AS quizzes_completed
                  FROM courses AS c
                  LEFT JOIN assignments AS a
                    ON a.course_id = c.id AND a.student_id = %s AND a.is_complete = 1
                  LEFT JOIN quizzes AS q
                    ON q.course_id = c.id AND q.student_id = %s AND q.is_complete = 1
                  WHERE c.is_complete = 1 AND c.student_id = %s"""

def create_course(request):
    title = request.POST['title']
    description = request.POST.get('description')

    with connection.cursor() as cursor:
        query = f"INSERT INTO courses (title, description) VALUES ('{title}','{description}')"
        cursor.execute(query)

    return render(request, 'course_created.html')

urlpatterns = [

]

    description = request.form['description']

    cursor = db.cursor()
    cursor.execute(query, [description, goal_id])
    db.commit()
